items.title: Meet Prudentia
items.description:
Tokinvest’s First Public Drop
There is something enduring about thoroughbred racing. It sits at the intersection of sport, heritage and performance, shaped by discipline, patience and preparation. For generations, racehorse participation has been aspirational but rarely accessible. With Tokinvest’s first Drop, a structured alternative is introduced.

items.title: What is a Drop?
items.description:
A Drop is how new opportunities are released on Tokinvest.
Each Drop gives eligible users the chance to participate in a specific real-world asset through our regulated investment portal, during a defined opening window.

items.title: Tokinvest and Maddox Gallery Partner to Bring Fractional Art Investment to Dubai
items.description: Tokinvest has announced a partnership with Maddox Gallery, a contemporary art gallery and art investment advisory, to tokenise physical artworks and offer fractional access to curated art investments.

items.title: Dubai Racing Club and Tokinvest Announce Partnership to Develop a Global Equine Token Marketplace
items.description: Dubai Racing Club, today announces a partnership with Dubai-based Tokinvest, and plans to explore the launch of a pioneering racehorse tokenisation programme, with the ambition of creating a global equine token marketplace and introducing new ways for fans to engage with elite horseracing.

items.title: Tokinvest and World Mobile Partner to Create the First Tokenised DePIN Investments
items.description: Tokinvest, the VARA-regulated platform for real-world asset (RWA) tokenisation, today announced a landmark partnership with World Mobile, the blockchain-powered telecommunications network, to create tokenised DePIN (Decentralised Physical Infrastructure Network) investment opportunities.

items.title: Tokinvest Partners with API Global to Unlock Tokenised Real Estate for a New Generation of Investors
items.description: Tokinvest, the regulated platform making real-world asset investing accessible to everyone, today announced a strategic partnership with API Global, a UK-based property investment and distribution company that has transacted over US$2 billion in real estate since its inception.

items.title: Tokinvest and Singularry SuperApp Partner to Make Regulated Real-World Asset Investing Accessible to Everyone
items.description: Tokinvest, a VARA-licensed platform for tokenised real-world assets (RWAs), has announced a partnership with Singularry SuperApp, a UAE-based fintech that blends artificial intelligence (AI) with decentralised finance (DeFi) to make digital investing more human-centric and straightforward.

items.title: Tokinvest Golden Hour: 60 Minutes’ Early Access to Tokenised Real Estate in Dubai
items.description: Tokinvest Golden Hour gives qualified waitlisters a 60-minute early access window to subscribe to upcoming allocations on our VARA-regulated real-world assets (RWA) platform. Be first in the queue and don’t miss out.
